title: CommunityResource
description: A public-safety advisory, scam alert, or community resource published by the Richmond County DA. Modeled from statenislandda.org/scams-information/ (fraud/scam warnings aimed especially at seniors) and related safety-workshop material. These are consumer-protection notices the office wants residents to act on; today they exist only as HTML pages with no feed, no API, and no Open Data twin.

audience.description: Primary audience (e.g. seniors, parents, small businesses).

relatedTipForm.description: Tip form residents can use to act on the advisory.
